name: assembly-mesh-determinism
description: Wave 3 Phase 5d — E6 mesh-extraction determinism baseline on the Mechanical Assembly scene. 8-field hybrid scene with CSG difference operations exercises the per-atom dispatch path (each atom owns its own brick at shared cells) → multi-tape mesh extraction. Most complex of the three determinism fixtures: catches regressions in cascade-adapter brick-info ordering, multi-atom slot allocation, and per-atom tape resolution.
